headline: Verizon adds new offer that removes 2 major fees for customers
summary: Verizon is doubling down on efforts to win back cost-conscious customers with a new offer that lets them avoid two major fees. The move comes as the carrier faces elevated churn in its wireless business. During an earnings call in January, Verizon CEO Dan Schulman revealed that in the last ...
